## [00:00 - 01:08]

The last time I did life design with Ali, as I was connecting my dots, I realized there was a theme for me. And one of my themes was connection. I love doing things with other people. However, I noted with my career though, let's use this analogy, in my career, I'm a solo artist. But what I love is I love being a part of a band. I love the Backstreet Boys. I love bands. I love Kevin Hart and How He's Got a Crew. I love team environment things. I love connection. And that's when I started to pull the dots together. I thought, oh, I don't want to just be a solo artist in my career. I want to be a band and that's the way I want it. I want it that way, right? So thank you. That's the power of these things, is that when we start to connect some of these dots, it dictates the way you move forward. And when I realized the things that were important to me, things that sparked joy, key themes, put them together, then I'm able to make educated guesses as to what path do I want to go on. So many of you are seeking clarity. This is all part of the clarity process. Design the life you want to live. Don't leave this to chance.
